hypothesis: Stronger soft-dedup (14-day window, 0.15 penalty) reduces consecutive-day list overlap and raises weekly unique / NEW share on Skills digests without collapsing outbound repo CTR, because momentum ranking still orders the open field.
change_summary: Tighten soft-dedup for Skills digests only: DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_BRIEFINGS=14 and DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_PENALTY=0.15 (defaults today: 5 and 0.5).
notes: Queued behind EXP-20260701-landing-layout — do not start baseline until landing-layout treatment ends (~2026-08-23) and verdict is recorded. Also waits until EXP-20260628-web-enrich-skills is complete so Skills pipeline has only one treatment at a time. Backlog: RANK-2. Primary structural metrics from digest.json: mean consecutive-day overlap, unique repos / 7 days, share of is_new in top 10. Engagement: PostHog outbound_repo_click (edition=skills). Success bar (suggested): overlap down ≥15pp vs baseline and outbound CTR not worse than baseline by >20% relative. If under-delivers, plan Experiment B (discovery-slot quota) separately. Treatment: set DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_BRIEFINGS=14 and DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_PENALTY=0.15 on the Skills digest step in digest.yml; leave OSS at defaults. Import snapshots via npm run experiment -- snapshot after each window.
